description: Shorten mandate end-turn button text to single word, improve BushiIcon with curved katana blades and thicker stroke, and fix exhausted mandate indicator to exclude hidden (Loto) mandates.
steps: 2. In src/i18n/en.ts, change corresponding keys to 'Finish'.
3. In src/components/Icons.tsx BushiIcon, replace straight line blades with curved paths and increase strokeWidth to 2.5.
4. In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx, filter out hidden mandates when counting for exhausted indicator.
acceptance_criteria: All three end-turn buttons show 'Terminar' in Spanish and 'Finish' in English
BushiIcon shows curved katana blades with thicker strokes
Exhausted mandate indicator only counts face-up (non-hidden) mandates
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
Run npx vite build to verify build succeeds
findings: All three changes implemented and verified. tsc --noEmit and vite build both pass cleanly. Button text shortened to single word in both languages. BushiIcon uses quadratic bezier curves (Q) for katana blade curvature with strokeWidth 2.5. PoliticsTrack mandateCounts loop now skips mandates with hidden===true so Loto secret mandates do not trigger the exhausted indicator.
